name: web3d-2026-starter
description: Scroll-driven and pointer-driven 3D hero. WebGPU + TSL + R3F v9 + GSAP + Lenis (June 2026).
//versions: These are a verified floor (WebGPU is zero-config since three r171 / 0.171). After install, run the upgrade command in README.md to pull the latest stable.
//optional: Add when the brief needs them: @react-three/drei (loaders, Environment, controls), @react-three/postprocessing (bloom/DOF), @react-three/rapier + ecctrl (physics), @react-spring/three (spring-based 3D motion).
